extraction.method: Ordinal exact-substring match in the decoded HTML response; each required fragment occurred exactly once.

scope_limit: These fields bind the author's publication-chart snapshot only. Pine v1 itself is chart-timeframe and chart-symbol-timezone generic; transporting this M15/New-York context to XAUUSD.DWX and EURUSD.DWX is a preregistered hypothesis, not a universal Pine property.
